name: Salmon Cakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain and flake the canned salmon.
2. Stir in the cracker crumbs, beaten eggs, salt, and paprika until well combined.
3. Form the ingredients into patties.
4. Heat butter in a pan over medium heat.
5. Cook the patties for about 4-5 minutes on each side or until golden brown.
6. Serve the salmon cakes with mushroom or celery soup sauce and chopped fresh fennel.
